results.title: How does Douyin recommendation work?
results.content: A discussion thread with mixed opinions and no first-party verification.
results.raw_content: Forum discussion snippets compare user guesses, anecdotal creator stories, ranking folklore, and speculative retention advice, but the thread never becomes a first-party document and should not be promoted into direct evidence.
